title: Role-Based Onboarding Content Review
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see onboarding content tailored to my role, so that the guidance I receive is relevant to how I will use the product.
description:
Review and potentially customize the onboarding experience based on user role. Initial analysis determined that 90%+ of users are Salesforce admins or developers who should have the same experience, making role-based customization unnecessary at this stage.

The decision was made to defer role-based onboarding until the application supports non-Salesforce users in a future version. No features were shipped for this ticket.
acceptance_criteria: Onboarding experience is reviewed for role-based customization potential
Decision documented: 90%+ user base is admins/devs with same needs
Role-based onboarding deferred to future version supporting non-Salesforce users
implementation_notes: No features shipped. After data analysis, 90%+ of users are Salesforce admins or devs who should have the same onboarding experience. Role-based onboarding will be revisited when the app forks to support non-Salesforce users.
comment_summary: Developer asked about role-based navigation customization. Product owner reviewed user data and decided role-based onboarding is not justified given the homogeneous user base. Deferred to a future version.
